refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the operational context ensures clarity and testability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor network link status continuously.
FR2: Manage link recovery and redundancy to maintain availability.
FR3: Report link status and alerts to relevant modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network link management with failover.
DP2: Real-time link health monitoring and predictive maintenance.
DP3: Adaptive bandwidth allocation and error correction protocols.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network link management with failover.

potential_sources: Dependency on network hardware status from Vehicle module.
Interaction with Teleoperation for link failover control.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates link availability management but requires interfaces with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

assumptions_risks: Assumes redundant network hardware is available and supported.
Risk of failover delay impacting link availability.
High safety criticality demands robust failover mechanisms.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding predictive monitoring (DP2) in future refinement to reduce failover risk.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Manages teleoperation link availability including failover and monitoring logic.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Interface to physical and logical network link hardware for status and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends link status and alerts to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands related to link management and failover triggers.

module_containment_scores.notes: High diffusion due to cross-cutting concerns; low containment as link management is not core NGHE logic.
Moderate containment as Vehicle hardware status is relevant; moderate diffusion due to shared responsibilities.
High containment as Teleoperation owns link management; low diffusion indicating good modularization.
Low containment; Safety Services consumes alerts but does not manage link availability.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning link availability management to Teleoperation module centralizes control and minimizes diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential coupling with Vehicle hardware status may require interface refinement.
Failover logic complexity may increase module size and reduce cohesion.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review interface definitions with Vehicle module to ensure clear separation of concerns.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (redundant link management with failover) directly addresses the refined FR sub-functions and meets safety criticality.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists due to interaction with Vehicle module for hardware status.
Failover logic complexity may increase coupling if not carefully modularized.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment scores and low diffusion, supporting good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and link availability statistics is feasible within Teleoperation module scope.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Clarify and formalize interfaces with Vehicle module for hardware status exchange.
Consider future refinement to include predictive monitoring to reduce failover risk.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, interface definitions with Vehicle module need refinement to reduce coupling and improve containment.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor network link status continuously.
FR2: Manage link recovery and redundancy to maintain availability.
FR3: Report link status and alerts to relevant modules.

revise.why: To refine interface boundaries and reduce coupling with Vehicle module.

assumptions: Redundant network hardware is available and supported.
Teleoperation module can implement failover logic effectively.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data demonstrating link availability performance.
Interface specification documents between Teleoperation and Vehicle modules.
